data.title: Iran war unresolved 'because of Trump’s mistake,' expert warns | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: “The Iranian hubris is overflowing,” INSS Iran researcher Beni Sabti said, warning that the only way to push the regime to accept negotiations is through renewed strikes.
data.keywords: Iran,iran israel war,iran missiles,iran negotiations,iran us nuclear talks,us israel iran,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
